'''Desargorr''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Known for its beautiful [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges,<ref name="MtL" /> the planet was rich in [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] and was pitted by millennia of ruthless [[Mining/Legends|mining]], as were the [[Desargorr system/Legends|Desargorr system's]] numerous [[Moon/Legends|moons]], [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] and [[Comet/Legends|comets]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' {{1stm}}
